items.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
items.whyYouShouldCare: The entry of a Solana community lead into UK politics highlights the potential for on-chain transparency to influence governance and community engagement.

items.title: Alameda Research moves $15.1M in SOL – Can Solana hold $70?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Alameda Research's movement of $15.1M in SOL raises questions about market stability and the ability of Solana to maintain a $70 price point.

items.title: Tether CEO: ‘Demand for dollar settlement is a wages story’ – $7M Pact Labs investment proves it
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tether's CEO emphasizes the growing demand for dollar settlements, indicating a shift in market dynamics that could impact liquidity and infrastructure in the crypto space.
